calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Toss Designs, Inc., a California corporation, Jennifer Hogan, an individual, and Michael Perlstein, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8090. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Dustin M. Amrein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bi-Skan, Ltd., a Utah limited partnership.
No appearance by defendants Toss Designs, Inc., a California corporation, Jennifer Hogan, an individual, or Michael Perlstein, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease and Enforcement of Guaranty was filed on September 26, 2018, and personally served on defendant Michael Perlstein, an individual, on October 3, 2018.
Substitute service on defendants Toss Designs, Inc. a California corporation, and Jennifer Hogan, an individual, occurred on October 3, 2018 and was effectuated on October 13, 2018.
Default as to all three defendants was entered on November 20, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 28, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 18, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bi-Skan, Ltd., a Utah limited partnership, and against the defaulted defendants Toss Designs, Inc., a California corporation, Jennifer Hogan, an individual, and Michael Perlstein, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $147,781.18.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,059.67.
Attorney Fees - $6,409.00.
Costs - $731.55.

Total - $174,981.40.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Continued To Feb-11-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
